markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explore a potential marketing partnership between Inworld AI and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Inworld's Challenge:** A "leaky faucet" marketing gap requires immediate support while Inworld searches for a VP of Marketing. The goal is to scale GTM to match the company's leading voice AI technology.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** A managed service using AI-driven workflows and human editors to build an organic growth engine. The model is proven in AI, with clients like Augment Code achieving 17% AI visibility and Lovable reaching ROI breakeven in 4 months.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**The Offer:** An 8-week, $15k/mo risk-free sprint to validate the partnership. A 4–6 week lead time is required before the sprint begins.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:** In a competitive AI space where APIs are easily swapped, distribution is a critical moat. The strategy is to build domain authority with high-volume, quality content to win high-intent enterprise searches.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

## Topics

### Inworld's Marketing Gap

  - [**Core Problem:** A "leaky faucet" marketing gap needs immediate support while Inworld searches for a VP of Marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [**Product Strength:** Inworld's voice AI model is a technical leader, outperforming 11 Labs and OpenAI on the leading text-to-speech benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**GTM Weakness:** The go-to-market function is underdeveloped.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Team:** A new VP of Sales just started; the marketing team is lean (1 growth marketer, 1 field marketer).](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Gaps:** No ownership for social, content, AEO, or GEO.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### GrowthX's Organic Growth Engine

  - [**Service Model:** A managed service using AI-driven workflows and human editors to build an organic growth engine.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
    1.  [**Strategy Sprint (8 weeks):** Define strategy, calibrate workflows, and begin publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
    2.  [**Ongoing Execution (12-month contract):** Scale content production and optimize based on performance signals.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [**Pricing:** $15,000/month for the 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**Lead Time:** 4–6 weeks before sprint kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)

### Strategic Rationale & Case Studies

  - [**Core Strategy:** Build domain authority with high-volume, quality content to win high-intent enterprise searches.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [**Competitive Context (11 Labs):** Grew from 400 to 4,400 pages in two years, using programmatic content to build authority and capture broad search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [**Case Studies:**](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** Achieved 17% AI visibility for key prompts (e.g., "best enterprise AI coding tools"), nearly matching Cursor.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [**Lovable:** Reached ROI breakeven in 4 months, converting hundreds of sign-ups to paid plans. The client doubled their scope.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
      - [**VAPI:** Programmatically created hundreds of use-case pages (e.g., "voice AI for wellness clinics") that continue to perform well.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

### Engagement Model

  - [**Team:** A dedicated strategist is the single point of contact, supported by a full team (AI engineers, editors, Chief Content Officer).](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [**Collaboration:** Integrated via shared Slack and Notion; platform access will be provided in the next month.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send Florin the sample Statement of Work (SoW) and available kickoff dates.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [**Florin:** Review materials and follow up with questions via email.](https://fathom.video/share/5rgrxvzz5YogG1yn-p96EsgoUyrQhFfu?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
